/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/HeartRateCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/Sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/dsp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/MusicPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibepulse_hr.dir/src/ZoneMusicPlayer.cpp.o -o vibepulse_hr  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgpiod.so
